CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO VUONG ANH LAN BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-15-2012 AT 3:30PM.

RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 6/18/12 TO DEFENDANT CHUN SI YUAN, "REFUSED/RETURN TO SENDER".
